message:
fix: EventsTimeline infinite loop, DynamicCard config crash, analytics donut labels (#5310)

Three fixes from GA4 error analysis:

1. EventsTimeline: wrap IIFE calculations in useMemo to prevent
   infinite render loop — availableClustersForFilter, filteredEvents,
   and timeSeriesData were creating new references every render,
   cascading through useMemo → ECharts → re-render. 53 GA4 errors
   across /clusters, /cluster-admin, /compliance.

2. DynamicCard: guard searchFields[0] access with length check and
   use nullish coalescing for defaultLimit — prevents "Cannot
   destructure property 'filter' of 'config'" crash on /alerts
   when custom cards have undefined config. 10 GA4 errors.

3. Analytics donut chart: use error category (e.detail) instead of
   generic event name (e.event) for the legend — so the chart shows
   "unhandled_rejection", "card_render", etc. instead of just "error"
   repeated for every slice.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
